name: Research & Survey Support
summary: Questionnaires, sampling support, codebooks, data-management plans and fieldwork quality checks.

name: Data Cleaning & Validation
summary: Reproducible cleaning, missing-data review, recoding, anomaly checks and validation reporting.

name: Statistical Analysis
summary: Descriptive, inferential, regression and time-series analysis aligned to the research question.

name: Dashboards & Reporting
summary: Interactive dashboards, clear visualisations and decision-focused reports for stakeholders.

name: AI Model Evaluation
summary: Rubric-based model-output review, dataset auditing, factuality checks and quality assurance.

name: Analytical Web Tool
summary: A lightweight Streamlit, Python or JavaScript application for a focused analytical workflow.

name: Project Consultation
summary: A structured session to clarify your question, data, method, risks, timeline and next steps.
